고린도후서 10:1.content: Now I Paul, myself, entreat you by the humility and gentleness of Christ, I who in your presence am lowly among you, but being absent am bold toward you.

고린도후서 10:2.content: Yes, I beg you that I may not, when present, show courage with the confidence with which I intend to be bold against some, who consider us to be walking according to the flesh.

고린도후서 10:3.content: For though we walk in the flesh, we don’t wage war according to the flesh;

고린도후서 10:4.content: for the weapons of our warfare are not of the flesh, but mighty before God to the throwing down of strongholds,

고린도후서 10:5.content: throwing down imaginations and every high thing that is exalted against the knowledge of God and bringing every thought into captivity to the obedience of Christ,

고린도후서 10:6.content: and being in readiness to avenge all disobedience when your obedience is made full.

고린도후서 10:7.content: Do you look at things only as they appear in front of your face? If anyone trusts in himself that he is Christ’s, let him consider this again with himself, that even as he is Christ’s, so we also are Christ’s.

고린도후서 10:8.content: For even if I boast somewhat abundantly concerning our authority, which the Lord gave for building you up, and not for casting you down, I will not be ashamed,

고린도후서 10:9.content: that I may not seem as if I desire to terrify you by my letters.

고린도후서 10:10.content: For, “His letters”, they say, “are weighty and strong, but his bodily presence is weak, and his speech is despised.”

고린도후서 10:11.content: Let such a person consider this, that what we are in word by letters when we are absent, such are we also in deed when we are present.

고린도후서 10:12.content: For we are not bold to number or compare ourselves with some of those who commend themselves. But they themselves, measuring themselves by themselves, and comparing themselves with themselves, are without understanding.

고린도후서 10:13.content: But we will not boast beyond proper limits, but within the boundaries with which God appointed to us, which reach even to you.

고린도후서 10:14.content: For we don’t stretch ourselves too much, as though we didn’t reach to you. For we came even as far as to you with the Good News of Christ,

고린도후서 10:15.content: not boasting beyond proper limits in other men’s labors, but having hope that as your faith grows, we will be abundantly enlarged by you in our sphere of influence,

고린도후서 10:16.content: so as to preach the Good News even to the parts beyond you, not to boast in what someone else has already done.

고린도후서 10:17.content: But “he who boasts, let him boast in the Lord.”

고린도후서 10:18.content: For it isn’t he who commends himself who is approved, but whom the Lord commends.
